items.title: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire
items.dek: President Macron said there would be no leniency for arsonists, as France - along with much of Europe - deals with a series of unusual heatwaves.
items.body: President Macron said there would be no leniency for arsonists, as France - along with much of Europe - deals with a series of unusual heatwaves.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient
items.dek: Most of the recent cases were among travellers from the Democratic Republic of Congo.
items.body: Most of the recent cases were among travellers from the Democratic Republic of Congo.

items.title: More than 800 Canadian wildfires burning as air quality alerts extend to US
items.dek: The air quality in large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota is deemed "hazardous" by authorities.
items.body: The air quality in large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota is deemed "hazardous" by authorities.
